steps.title: Identify what the passage is contrasting
steps.content: The passage says the Nobel Prize often goes to “a single person,” then states “recognition isn't restricted to _____________ individuals,” followed by “Instead, success... is usually achieved through collaboration.” The blank must name the individual, non-collaborative work style—the opposite of what success actually requires.

steps.title: Match the word to complete the logic
steps.content:
”Solitary” means working alone—the exact descriptor for individuals operating without collaboration.

Recognition doesn't limit itself to such people because success in chemistry requires teamwork.

The other choices miss the point: coordinated means working together (not solitude), coincidental doesn't apply to people, and considerate refers to personality, not work method.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
